activation_gate: Deferred. Activate only after current ComfyUI foundation, runtime lanes, cost controls, and Wave70 Mask Factory coverage are stable enough that physics-map work will not derail nearer project milestones.

external_references.name: Blender command line and background automation
external_references.usage: Blender-first adapter can run scripted scene import, fitting, simulation prep, render-pass export, and validation from command line.

external_references.name: SideFX Houdini hython/hbatch batch workflow
external_references.usage: Optional Houdini adapter can run procedural/SDF/Vellum-style simulation and render/export tasks through command-line tools.

external_references.name: Unreal Python command-line scripting
external_references.usage: Optional Unreal adapter can automate editor/script tasks for physics assets, animation, rendered passes, and real-time simulation evidence.

external_references.name: DAZ Studio scripting
external_references.usage: DAZ is treated as prototype sculpt/source intake and scriptable export surface, not the production physics authority.

external_references.name: DAZ silent FBX export sample
external_references.usage: DAZ prototype packages can be exported without interactive export dialogs when DAZ is available.

external_references.name: DAZ neutral prototype boundary
external_references.usage: DAZ is a neutral A/T-pose prototype and export source only; DAZ dForce, grip posing, hand posing, runtime morphing, production rigging, and production deformation are not allowed after prototype registration.

external_references.name: Marvelous Designer Python API
external_references.usage: Optional clothing adapter can automate garment import, simulation, and export where licensed/available.

external_references.name: Marvelous Designer export API list
external_references.usage: Optional clothing adapter can export OBJ/Alembic and related artifacts for downstream fitting, collision, and map baking.

purpose: Define every physics, deformation, gravity, collision, morph, surface-detail, and ComfyUI-equivalent map required for autonomous hyperrealistic image, video, and audio generation.

requirements.acceptance_criteria: vertex_weight_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for pinning, stiffness, softness, jiggle amount, deformation zones.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import vertex_weight_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document pinning, stiffness, softness, jiggle amount, deformation zones.
requirements.notes: Controls: 0-1 per-vertex influence. Used for: pinning, stiffness, softness, jiggle amount, deformation zones. ComfyUI equivalent: grayscale mask or Advanced-ControlNet strength mask. Body regions: all soft-body regions.
requirements.title: Define and prove vertex_weight_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: skin_weight_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for normal rig deformation and joint motion.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import skin_weight_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document normal rig deformation and joint motion.
requirements.notes: Controls: bone-to-mesh influence. Used for: normal rig deformation and joint motion. ComfyUI equivalent: pose map/keypoints plus rig metadata. Body regions: full body, face, hands, feet.
requirements.title: Define and prove skin_weight_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: pin_anchor_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for stable ribs, pelvis, skull, hands, joints.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import pin_anchor_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document stable ribs, pelvis, skull, hands, joints.
requirements.notes: Controls: areas locked or nearly locked to skeleton. Used for: stable ribs, pelvis, skull, hands, joints. ComfyUI equivalent: protected negative mask. Body regions: skeleton anchors and identity anchors.
requirements.title: Define and prove pin_anchor_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: damping_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for heavy vs bouncy movement.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import damping_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document heavy vs bouncy movement.
requirements.notes: Controls: how fast motion settles. Used for: heavy vs bouncy movement. ComfyUI equivalent: temporal decay metadata; no direct ComfyUI equivalent. Body regions: soft tissue regions and cloth.
requirements.title: Define and prove damping_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: bend_stretch_shear_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for clothing, skin folds, soft tissue surfaces.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import bend_stretch_shear_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document clothing, skin folds, soft tissue surfaces.
requirements.notes: Controls: cloth or soft mesh bending/stretching/shearing. Used for: clothing, skin folds, soft tissue surfaces. ComfyUI equivalent: lineart/depth/normal plus cloth mask. Body regions: cloth, abdomen, thighs, arms.
requirements.title: Define and prove bend_stretch_shear_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: collision_backstop_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for body contact, cloth-body collision, compression limits.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import collision_backstop_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document body contact, cloth-body collision, compression limits.
requirements.notes: Controls: where mesh collides or avoids penetration. Used for: body contact, cloth-body collision, compression limits. ComfyUI equivalent: contact mask, occlusion mask, depth map. Body regions: hands, clothing, support surfaces, multi-character contact.
requirements.title: Define and prove collision_backstop_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: morph_target_blendshape_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for body morphing, expressions, corrective poses.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import morph_target_blendshape_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document body morphing, expressions, corrective poses.
requirements.notes: Controls: stored vertex-position changes. Used for: body morphing, expressions, corrective poses. ComfyUI equivalent: reference render or shape-target metadata. Body regions: body, face, hands.
requirements.title: Define and prove morph_target_blendshape_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: corrective_shape_pose_space_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for elbows, knees, hips, shoulders, belly compression, thigh contact.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import corrective_shape_pose_space_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document elbows, knees, hips, shoulders, belly compression, thigh contact.
requirements.notes: Controls: pose-specific deformation fixes. Used for: elbows, knees, hips, shoulders, belly compression, thigh contact. ComfyUI equivalent: corrected depth/normal/reference frame. Body regions: joints and contact regions.
requirements.title: Define and prove corrective_shape_pose_space_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: delta_vertex_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for shape fitting and production rebuild evidence.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import delta_vertex_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document shape fitting and production rebuild evidence.
requirements.notes: Controls: offset from base mesh to morphed mesh. Used for: shape fitting and production rebuild evidence. ComfyUI equivalent: not native; rendered/depth/normal delta package. Body regions: production base mesh.
requirements.title: Define and prove delta_vertex_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: displacement_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for wrinkles, cellulite, folds, compression dents.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import displacement_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document wrinkles, cellulite, folds, compression dents.
requirements.notes: Controls: surface height/detail displacement. Used for: wrinkles, cellulite, folds, compression dents. ComfyUI equivalent: detail inpaint map or displacement-looking texture. Body regions: skin, fabric, support contact.
requirements.title: Define and prove displacement_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: vector_displacement_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for complex folds and sculpted deformations.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import vector_displacement_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document complex folds and sculpted deformations.
requirements.notes: Controls: 3D displacement directions. Used for: complex folds and sculpted deformations. ComfyUI equivalent: not native; rendered visual reference. Body regions: skin folds, cloth, pressure areas.
requirements.title: Define and prove vector_displacement_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: normal_bump_detail_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for pores, fine wrinkles, cellulite texture.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import normal_bump_detail_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document pores, fine wrinkles, cellulite texture.
requirements.notes: Controls: surface shading detail. Used for: pores, fine wrinkles, cellulite texture. ComfyUI equivalent: normal map, bump/detail image. Body regions: skin and fabric.
requirements.title: Define and prove normal_bump_detail_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: tension_compression_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for dynamic wrinkles, skin pull, fabric stress, contact lines.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import tension_compression_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document dynamic wrinkles, skin pull, fabric stress, contact lines.
requirements.notes: Controls: stretch/squeeze driver values. Used for: dynamic wrinkles, skin pull, fabric stress, contact lines. ComfyUI equivalent: wrinkle/contact mask. Body regions: skin, cloth, hands, support contact.
requirements.title: Define and prove tension_compression_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: sdf_volume_collision_fields has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for advanced collision and penetration prevention.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import sdf_volume_collision_fields, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document advanced collision and penetration prevention.
requirements.notes: Controls: signed distance to surface or volume. Used for: advanced collision and penetration prevention. ComfyUI equivalent: depth/geometry proxy evidence; not native. Body regions: whole body and support objects.
requirements.title: Define and prove sdf_volume_collision_fields

requirements.acceptance_criteria: elasticity_restitution_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for bounce, rebound, settling.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import elasticity_restitution_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document bounce, rebound, settling.
requirements.notes: Controls: how strongly a region rebounds. Used for: bounce, rebound, settling. ComfyUI equivalent: temporal response metadata plus reference sequence. Body regions: soft tissue and cloth.
requirements.title: Define and prove elasticity_restitution_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: friction_stiction_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for hand contact, cloth drag, body-on-surface realism.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import friction_stiction_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document hand contact, cloth drag, body-on-surface realism.
requirements.notes: Controls: slide vs stick at contact points. Used for: hand contact, cloth drag, body-on-surface realism. ComfyUI equivalent: contact mask plus audio/visual event metadata. Body regions: hands, thighs, support surfaces, clothing.
requirements.title: Define and prove friction_stiction_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: contact_normal_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for physically plausible compression direction.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import contact_normal_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document physically plausible compression direction.
requirements.notes: Controls: direction of pressure/contact. Used for: physically plausible compression direction. ComfyUI equivalent: normal/depth/contact map combination. Body regions: body-object and body-body contact.
requirements.title: Define and prove contact_normal_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: penetration_depth_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for clipping prevention and collision QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import penetration_depth_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document clipping prevention and collision QA.
requirements.notes: Controls: how much surfaces overlap or nearly overlap. Used for: clipping prevention and collision QA. ComfyUI equivalent: depth delta/occlusion evidence. Body regions: all collision pairs.
requirements.title: Define and prove penetration_depth_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: rest_shape_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for body-shape continuity after motion.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import rest_shape_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document body-shape continuity after motion.
requirements.notes: Controls: shape body returns to after deformation. Used for: body-shape continuity after motion. ComfyUI equivalent: before/after reference and delta maps. Body regions: soft tissue and face.
requirements.title: Define and prove rest_shape_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: temporal_decay_settling_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for jiggle, ripple, rebound decay.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import temporal_decay_settling_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document jiggle, ripple, rebound decay.
requirements.notes: Controls: how motion damps over time. Used for: jiggle, ripple, rebound decay. ComfyUI equivalent: frame sequence metrics. Body regions: video soft-body regions.
requirements.title: Define and prove temporal_decay_settling_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: global_gravity_vector_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for consistent sag, cloth drape, falling/settling direction.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import global_gravity_vector_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document consistent sag, cloth drape, falling/settling direction.
requirements.notes: Controls: scene gravity vector and scale. Used for: consistent sag, cloth drape, falling/settling direction. ComfyUI equivalent: scene metadata plus overlay arrows. Body regions: entire scene.
requirements.title: Define and prove global_gravity_vector_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: contact_load_transfer_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for body-on-bed/chair/floor and multi-character pressure.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import contact_load_transfer_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document body-on-bed/chair/floor and multi-character pressure.
requirements.notes: Controls: how weight transfers through contact. Used for: body-on-bed/chair/floor and multi-character pressure. ComfyUI equivalent: contact pressure mask plus depth/normal. Body regions: support surfaces and shared contact.
requirements.title: Define and prove contact_load_transfer_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: inertia_momentum_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for secondary body motion and heavy movement.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import inertia_momentum_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document secondary body motion and heavy movement.
requirements.notes: Controls: lag and follow-through behavior. Used for: secondary body motion and heavy movement. ComfyUI equivalent: motion vector/optical flow metadata. Body regions: video body motion.
requirements.title: Define and prove inertia_momentum_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: gravity_collision_response_maps has a schema record, generation/import route, preview overlay, value range validation, body-region mapping, ComfyUI translation, and QA evidence for sag plus compression plus rebound.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously create or import gravity_collision_response_maps, normalize it into the standard physics-map schema, declare ComfyUI equivalents, and block completion until evidence proves it can drive or document sag plus compression plus rebound.
requirements.notes: Controls: combined gravity and collision response. Used for: sag plus compression plus rebound. ComfyUI equivalent: multi-map physics package. Body regions: soft tissue, cloth, support surfaces.
requirements.title: Define and prove gravity_collision_response_maps

requirements.acceptance_criteria: abdomen_stomach_region declares required map types, protected anchors, gravity/collision behavior, ComfyUI outputs, and strict QA gates.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously select and validate required maps for abdomen_stomach_region whenever a scene, prompt, reference, or DAZ prototype includes that region.
requirements.notes: belly softness, compression, breathing, gravity sag, hands/clothing contact
requirements.title: Define physics preset coverage for abdomen_stomach_region

title: Soft-Body Physics And Deformation Map System
